description: Create deployment packaging: server/Dockerfile (multi-stage), root docker-compose.yml (api + db + web services), and nginx.conf for the web service.
steps: Create server/Dockerfile: Multi-stage build. Stage 1 (builder): FROM node:22-alpine, WORKDIR /app, COPY package*.json, npm ci, COPY prisma/, npx prisma generate, COPY src/ tsconfig.json, RUN npm run build (tsc only since prisma already generated). Stage 2 (runtime): FROM node:22-alpine, RUN addgroup -g 1001 qi && adduser -u 1001 -G qi -s /bin/sh -D qi, WORKDIR /app, COPY --from=builder /app/dist dist/, COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules node_modules/, COPY --from=builder /app/prisma prisma/, COPY package.json, USER qi, EXPOSE 8080, HEALTHCHECK CMD wget -q --spider http://localhost:8080/health || exit 1, CMD node dist/server.js

Create nginx.conf at root: Serve qi-webapp/ as static files from /usr/share/nginx/html. Proxy /api/* to http://api:8080 (strip /api prefix with rewrite). Add security headers: X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Content-Security-Policy default-src self.

Create docker-compose.yml at root: Three services. db: postgres:16-alpine with volume (qi_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data), env POSTGRES_USER/PASSWORD/DB. api: build context ./server, depends_on db, env DATABASE_URL pointing to db service, env SESSION_SECRET and DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY, command to run prisma migrate deploy then start server (sh -c 'npx prisma migrate deploy && node dist/server.js'). web: nginx:alpine, volumes mount qi-webapp/ and nginx.conf, depends_on api, ports 80:80. Networks: internal (api, db) + default (web, api).
Verify docker build works for the server Dockerfile: docker build -t qi-api:test ./server
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose.yml at root defines api, db, web services
nginx.conf exists with proxy rules and security headers
verification: Run `docker build -t qi-api:test ./server` and confirm it builds successfully
findings: Docker build succeeds (qi-api:test). HEALTHCHECK warning about OCI format is cosmetic - works correctly with standard Docker daemon. Prisma shows openssl detection warning in alpine but generates client successfully. Multi-stage build produces clean runtime image with non-root user (qi:1001).
